'''Kyle Bibb''' (born {{birth date|1987|1|25|df=y}}) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who last played for the [[Doncaster RLFC]] in the [[Championship (rugby league)|Championship]], as a {{rlp|pr}}.

He previously played in the [[Super League]] for [[Hull F.C.|Hull FC]], [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]],<ref name="WTW official site">{{cite web|url=http://www.wakefieldwildcats.co.uk/kyle-bibb-i603281.html|title=The Official Website of the Wakefield Trinity Wildcats|accessdate=6 September 2009|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20091005165130/http://www.wakefieldwildcats.co.uk/kyle-bibb-i603281.html|archivedate=5 October 2009 }}</ref> [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] and [[London Broncos|Harlequins RL]], Bibb joined the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] after a season in the second team at [[Hull F.C.]] making many first team appearances throughout the 2009 season. He was on loaned to Harlequins RL but was recalled by Wakefield Trinity Wildcats. In September 2010 Kyle Bibb signed for Championship One side the Dewsbury Rams.
